# Mavenn Platform

Mavenn transforms how teams capture and retrieve knowledge using a graph-aware retrieval engine.

## Key Features

- Automatic knowledge extraction from meetings, docs, and chat
- Semantic search with context-aware ranking
- Wikilink graph for navigating concept relationships
- Decay and reinforcement to keep knowledge fresh

## Integrations

Slack, Notion, GitHub, Google Workspace. Plugin SDK for custom connectors.

## Pricing

Free for teams up to 5. Pro at $12/user/month with unlimited entries and priority support.
